name: Market Making Starter
description: Run a basic market-making strategy with risk oversight
prerequisites: At least one exchange connected via /setup
workflow: 1. Ask volatility-analyst to classify the current vol regime for your target asset
2. Ask market-maker to propose bid/ask spreads based on the vol regime
3. Ask risk-manager to set position limits and max inventory
4. Ask market-maker to start quoting (paper mode)
5. After a few fills, run /health-report to check PnL and spread capture
expected_output: Two-sided quotes with spread capture metrics, inventory tracking, and PnL
failure_modes: High volatility regime → market-maker widens spreads automatically
Inventory buildup → risk-manager flags concentration risk
Adverse selection → orderflow-analyst can diagnose if hired
